adjudication.root_cause: The 8B generator recognized every terminal blocker and residual but selected neighboring non-release lifecycle verbs on two tasks. Exact remediation syntax is useful diagnostic information but is not required to establish that the answer channel recognizes eligibility and the decisive blocker before a tuning sweep whose utility rubric separately scores exact actions.
adjudication.why_not_rescore_v8: V8 prospectively scored the full tuple, so it remains failed. V9 changes the scored construct under a new identity rather than reinterpreting v8.

prospective_v9_requirements: Require schema-admissible action enums but score terminal eligibility and exact residual only for the sacrificial answer-channel gate.
Retain exact remediation match as a reported diagnostic and keep exact action scoring in the subsequent tuning utility rubric.
Keep 7/8 schema and scored-semantic floors, zero evaluator disagreement, one-shot 8B generation, label isolation, and all non-claims.
non_claims: V9 construct repair does not declare the two v8 actions correct.
No campaign or support claim follows.
